declared.title: Emboldened Offenders, Endangered Communities: Internet Shutdowns in 2024
declared.selection_rationale: Access Now's #KeepItOn annual shutdown report for 2024 (21 shutdowns across 15 African countries, the highest ever recorded for the region in a single year). Explicitly documents Kenya's mid-2024 protest-related disruption and its knock-on connectivity effects in Rwanda, plus continued Ethiopia (Tigray/Amhara) and Uganda (Facebook-blocking) restrictions — direct overlap with this corpus's other 2024-period entries (CIPESA's 2024 report, this org's own 2023 report), a real coverage-contribution/cross-org-comparison case rather than a constructed one. Publication date approximate (per URL path), exact day not independently confirmed.
